results.name: Substituted evidence, re-signed envelope
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: checker attestation does not verify (substituted or forged))

results.name: Stale checker transcript
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: stale transcript (outside freshness window))

results.name: Check bound to the wrong tool-set digest
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: result bound to the wrong tool-set digest)

results.name: Authorization bound to different parameters
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (authorization: params do not match the action)

results.name: Execution ack bound to another action
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (occurrence: acknowledgment bound to another action)

results.name: Emitter self-assertion, no independent attestation
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: attested by the emitter, not the checker authority)

results.name: Wired MCP-019 check (clean) accepted
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=accept (all four properties independently supported); expected accept

results.name: Wired MCP-019 check (composite found) rejected
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: recorded output is not a pass); expected reject

results.name: Wired MCP-019 check bound to wrong tool set rejected
results.details: envelope_valid=True; claim verdict=reject (check: result bound to the wrong tool-set digest); expected reject
